basic_details.job_title: RITES Individual Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Rail India Technical and Economic Service (RITES)
basic_details.short_information: Rail India Technical and Economic Service (RITES) Individual Consultant Notification 2026 has been released on 03 June 2026 on the official website of RITES. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the RITES Individual Consultant Recruitment 2026 for the posts of ICT Engineer 1: Hospital Management System (National) and Junior ICT Engineer.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in Engineering / Computer Science, B.E. / B.Tech. in Computer Science, Information Technology / MCA
qualification.details: Individual Consultant: ICT Engineer 1: Hospital Management System (National): Graduate in Engineering / Computer Science Individual Consultant: Junior ICT Engineer: B.E. / B.Tech. in Computer Science, Information Technology / MCA

vacancy_details.Post Name: Individual Consultant: ICT Engineer 1: Hospital Management System (National)

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 7,560/- per day / Rs. 90,000/- per month
salary_details.details: Individual Consultant: ICT Engineer 1: Hospital Management System (National): Rs. 7,560/- per day Individual Consultant: Junior ICT Engineer: Rs. 90,000/- per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the RITES Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RITES to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for RITES Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the RITES Individual Consultant posts is 19th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Individual Consultant posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for Individual Consultant posts in RITES Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications include Graduate in Engineering / Computer Science, B.E. / B.Tech. in Computer Science, Information Technology / MCA, depending on the specific post.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for RITES Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the mode of application for RITES Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for RITES Recruitment 2026 is entirely online.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the Individual Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The salary varies per post, with one offering Rs. 7,560/- per day and the other Rs. 90,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for RITES Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process involves Document Scrutiny followed by an Interview of shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for RITES Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link can be found in the Important Links section of this article.

faq.question: Q9. What are the important dates for the application process?
faq.answer: The application process starts on 3rd June 2026 and ends on 19th June 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a government job?
faq.answer: Yes, Rail India Technical and Economic Service (RITES) is a government organization, and these are contractual government job opportunities.
